## Auto Detailing Lexington SC: Professional Mobile Car Detailing Looking for **auto detailing Lexington SC**? We provide professional **mobile auto detailing** services throughout Lexington and surrounding areas. Our IDA-certified team brings showroom-quality results directly to your location. ### Why Choose Our Auto Detailing Lexington SC? **Mobile Convenience** Searching for **auto detailing near me**? We come to you! No need to drive to a shop, wait around, or arrange transportation. Our **mobile auto detailing** service saves you 2-3 hours. **Professional Equipment** Our **mobile vehicle detailing** van includes: - 200+ gallon onboard water system - Commercial-grade generator - Professional extractors - Dual-action polishers - Steam cleaning equipment **IDA Certified** Unlike many **auto detailing services**, we maintain International Detailing Association certification with ongoing professional training. ### Complete Auto Detailing Services Lexington SC #### Mobile Exterior Detailing **Basic Exterior Package - $150** - Hand wash with premium soap - Wheel and tire cleaning - Tire dressing application - Window cleaning - Quick wax protection **Premium Exterior Package - $250** - Everything in Basic - Clay bar treatment - Paint correction (single-stage) - Premium wax application - Chrome polishing - Trim restoration - Bug and tar removal **Ultimate Exterior Package - $400+** - Everything in Premium - Two-stage paint correction - Ceramic coating application - Headlight restoration - Engine bay detailing - Rain-X glass treatment #### Mobile Interior Detailing **Basic Interior Package - $150** - Complete vacuum (seats, carpets, trunk) - Dashboard and console cleaning - Door panel wipe-down - Window cleaning - Air freshener **Premium Interior Package - $250** - Everything in Basic - Steam cleaning all surfaces - Leather conditioning and protection - Fabric protection treatment - Stain removal - Deep crevice cleaning - Carpet shampooing **Ultimate Interior Package - $400+** - Everything in Premium - Odor elimination (ozone treatment) - Pet hair removal - Mold/mildew treatment - Headliner cleaning - Trunk detailing ### Auto Detailing Lexington SC: Service Areas Our **auto detailing Lexington SC** mobile service covers the full [Lexington SC service area](/locations/lexington-sc), including: - Downtown Lexington - Lake Murray area - Red Bank - Gilbert - Summit - Oak Grove - Pelion - Batesburg-Leesville - Chapin - Irmo (border areas) We service within 20 miles of Lexington with no travel fees. ### Mobile Auto Detailing vs Traditional Shops Why **mobile auto detailing near me** is better: | Feature | Mobile Detailing | Shop-Based | |---------|-----------------|------------| | Convenience | Come to you | Drive + wait | | Time Saved | 3+ hours | 0 hours | | Quality | Professional | Professional | | Price | $150-500 | $150-500 | | Watch Process | Yes | Usually no | | Equipment | Commercial | Commercial | ### What Makes Professional Auto Detailing Different? **Car Wash vs Auto Detailing:** A basic car wash cleans surface dirt. Professional **auto detailing services** involve: - **Deep Cleaning:** Every crevice, vent, and surface - **Paint Correction:** Remove swirls, scratches, oxidation - **Protection:** Wax, sealant, or ceramic coating - **Restoration:** Bring surfaces back to original condition - **Preservation:** Protect your vehicle's value ### Auto Detailing Lexington SC Pricing Your **car detailing in Lexington SC** cost depends on: **Vehicle Size:** - Sedan/Coupe: Base price - SUV/Truck: +$50 - Large SUV/Van: +$100 - Commercial vehicle: Custom quote **Condition:** - Well-maintained: Standard pricing - Moderate dirt: +$50-100 - Heavy soiling/pet hair: +$100-200 - Extreme neglect: +$200-300 **Service Level:** - Basic clean: $150-200 - Premium detail: $250-350 - Ultimate/ceramic: $400-600 ### Special Packages for Lexington Customers **Lake Murray Boat & Vehicle Package - $600** - Boat interior/exterior detail - Vehicle full detail - Same-day service - Trailer cleaning included **Monthly Maintenance - $150/month** - Monthly exterior wash/wax - Interior vacuum - Window cleaning - Tire shine - Priority scheduling **Family Fleet Package - $500** - 2 vehicles basic detail - Perfect for busy families - Can be split over 2 days ### How Mobile Auto Detailing Works **Step 1: Book Your Appointment** Call **(803) 667-8731** or book online. Choose your package and preferred date/time. **Step 2: We Come to You** Our **mobile auto detailing** team arrives at your Lexington location with all necessary equipment. **Step 3: Professional Service** 2-5 hours depending on package and vehicle size. You can watch the process or go about your day. **Step 4: Final Inspection** We walk you through the completed work and answer any questions. ### Lexington SC Auto Detailing: What Sets Us Apart **Self-Contained Mobile Unit** We don't need your water or electricity. Our van is completely self-sufficient. **Eco-Friendly Products** Biodegradable, pH-balanced cleaning products safe for Lexington's Lake Murray watershed. **Satisfaction Guarantee** Not happy with any aspect of our **auto detailing services**? We'll make it right. **Flexible Scheduling** Evenings and weekends available for busy schedules. ### Customer Reviews: Auto Detailing Lexington SC *"Best mobile auto detailing I've found! Came to my house on Lake Murray and made my boat and truck look brand new."* - Tom H., Lake Murray *"Outstanding service. My Tahoe had years of kid spills and pet hair. They got everything out and it looks showroom quality."* - Jennifer M., Red Bank *"Professional automotive detailing at a fair price. The mobile service is so convenient - they detailed my car in my driveway."* - Mark S., Lexington ### Ceramic Coating in Lexington SC Want ultimate paint protection? Ask about our ceramic coating services: **3-Year Ceramic Package - $500** - Paint correction prep - Professional ceramic coating - 3-year warranty - Hydrophobic properties - UV protection **5-Year Ceramic Package - $700** - Two-stage paint correction - Premium ceramic coating - 5-year warranty - Superior gloss and depth - Stain resistance ### Auto Detailing Maintenance Tips Between professional **auto detailing Lexington SC** visits: **Weekly:** - Rinse off pollen (especially in spring) - Quick interior wipe-down - Shake out floor mats **Monthly:** - Wash exterior with pH-neutral soap - Vacuum interior - Clean windows inside and out **Quarterly:** - Professional detailing service - Wax or coating maintenance - Deep interior clean ### Book Your Lexington SC Auto Detailing Ready for professional **mobile auto detailing**? **📞 Call (803) 667-8731** **📧 Email: mikahsautodetailing@gmail.com** **Service Hours:** - Monday-Friday: 8:00 AM - 6:00 PM - Saturday: 9:00 AM - 5:00 PM - Sunday: By appointment ### FAQs: Auto Detailing Lexington SC **Do you need access to my water or power?** No! Our **mobile vehicle detailing** unit is completely self-contained. **How long does mobile auto detailing take?** Basic packages: 2-3 hours. Premium packages: 3-4 hours. Ultimate packages: 4-6 hours. **Can you remove pet hair?** Yes! We specialize in pet hair removal using professional-grade tools and techniques. **Do you offer same-day service?** Depending on schedule availability. Frequently Asked Questions

Do you provide auto detailing services throughout Lexington SC?

Yes! We provide comprehensive auto detailing throughout Lexington SC including downtown Lexington, Oak Grove, Red Bank, Gilbert, and surrounding areas. Our mobile service brings IDA-certified detailing directly to homes and businesses across Lexington County.

How much does auto detailing cost in Lexington SC?

Auto detailing in Lexington SC ranges from $150 for basic exterior details to $500+ for full interior/exterior with ceramic coating. Mid-range packages averaging $250-350 include complete wash, wax, interior deep clean, and paint protection - perfect for most vehicles.

What makes your Lexington auto detailing service different?

Our Lexington SC service stands out with IDA certification, mobile convenience, professional-grade equipment, and specialized knowledge of local conditions. We understand how Lexington's climate affects vehicles and use appropriate protection against humidity, pollen, and UV damage.

Can you detail boats and RVs in Lexington SC?

Yes! Beyond cars and trucks, we detail boats, RVs, motorcycles, and commercial vehicles throughout Lexington SC. Lake Murray boat owners particularly appreciate our expertise in water spot removal and marine-grade protection treatments.

Do you offer fleet detailing for Lexington businesses?

Absolutely! We provide fleet detailing services for Lexington SC businesses including car dealerships, rental companies, and corporate fleets. Volume discounts available for regular maintenance schedules to keep your business vehicles looking professional.

Is your auto detailing environmentally friendly?

Yes! Our Lexington SC detailing service uses eco-friendly, biodegradable products and water-efficient techniques. Our mobile units reclaim and filter water to minimize environmental impact while delivering superior results that protect your vehicle and our community.
